steps.goal: Discover what types of unit conversion categories are available for humanitarian logistics work
Convert a distance measurement for travel planning between field locations
Convert a weight measurement for calculating aid supply quantities
Learn what temperature units are supported for various climate-related needs
Convert a temperature reading for understanding local weather conditions

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and resource-oriented. Focuses on practical information needed for field operations. Prefers direct answers over lengthy explanations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced with practical measurements but may not know metric/imperial conversions offhand. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has completed all conversion goals and has the information needed for their humanitarian logistics planning.
